SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.mx.client

Class XBillDnsRecordClient

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.mx.client.XBillDnsRecordClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
DnsRecordClient
public class XBillDnsRecordClient extends Object implements DnsRecordClient
XBill Dns Record Client.

DNS TXT record lookup client implementation specific for MTA-STS.

Uses DNS Java library.

A custom resolver can be provided via Lookup.setDefaultResolver().

One such resolver is provided for testing purposes.

See Also:
  • Lookup
  • LocalDnsResolver

  • Constructor Details

    • XBillDnsRecordClient

      public XBillDnsRecordClient()

  • Method Details

    • getStsRecord

      public Optional<StsRecord> getStsRecord(String domain)
      Gets DNS TXT MTA-STS record.

      Will query the _mta-sts. subdomain of the domain provided.

      If multiple MTA-STS records found it will return none.

      Specified by:
      getStsRecord in interface DnsRecordClient
      Parameters:
      domain - Domain string.
      Returns:
      Optional of StsRecord instance.

    • getRptRecord

      public Optional<StsReport> getRptRecord(String domain)
      Gets DNS TXT TLSRPT record.

      Will query the _smtp._tls. subdomain of the domain provided.

      If multiple TLSRPT records found it will return none.

      Specified by:
      getRptRecord in interface DnsRecordClient
      Parameters:
      domain - Domain string.
      Returns:
      Optional of StsReport instance.

    • getARecords

      public Optional<List<DnsRecord>> getARecords(String domain)
      Gets A MX records.
      Parameters:
      domain - Domain string.
      Returns:
      Optional of List of MXRecord instances.

    • getMxRecords

      public Optional<List<DnsRecord>> getMxRecords(String domain)
      Gets DNS MX records.

      Will query for MX records of the domain provided.

      Will not fall back to A record if none found.

      Specified by:
      getMxRecords in interface DnsRecordClient
      Parameters:
      domain - Domain string.
      Returns:
      Optional of List of MXRecord instances.

    • getPtrRecord

      public Optional<String> getPtrRecord(String ipAddress)
      Gets DNS PTR record for a given IP address.
      Specified by:
      getPtrRecord in interface DnsRecordClient
      Parameters:
      ipAddress - IPv4/IPv6 string.
      Returns:
      Optional with the first PTR target (FQDN) if present.

    • getRecord

      private org.xbill.DNS.Record[] getRecord(String uri, int type)
      Gets DNS TXT record.
      Parameters:
      uri - Lookup URI string.
      type - Lookup type int.
      Returns:
      Optional of StsRecord instance.

    • cachePtr

      private void cachePtr(String ipAddress, String value)
      Caches PTR lookup result.
      Parameters:

      value - PTR target string.
